headline: American Water Works Updates Projects And Regulation As Valuation Tension Emerges
summary: American Water Works Company (NYSE:AWK) has completed a major infrastructure upgrade in California, aimed at improving system reliability and service quality. The company has announced leadership transitions within its New Jersey American Water unit, reshaping management for a key service territory. American Water participated in the Mid-America Regulatory Conference, engaging directly with regulators on sector and policy issues. Settlements on rate cases in Virginia and California signal...
